TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Elmer Behnke Elmer Behnke Elmer Behnke nalecuh i Rockford, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Elmer Behnke i 1951 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 37, namapili' tu nu Rochester Royals putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 2 bulad 3 demiad, 1929 a mihcaan, Elmer Behnke, u miunduay ciniza.
S.PHON: …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ôƒßnk…ô …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ôƒßnk…ô …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ôƒßnk…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i *o ¶kford, ir~…ær~…æinois, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput. …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ôƒßnk…ô i **** a miƒß ¶aan nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu *o ¶ƒß…ôst…ôr *ojar~…æs putiput. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ôƒßnk…ô, u miunduaj ¶iniza.
S.FORM: Elmer Behnke Elmer Behnke Elmer Behnke nalecuh i Rockford, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Elmer Behnke i 1951 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 37, namapili' tu nu Rochester Royals putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 2 bulad 3 demiad, 1929 a mihcaan, Elmer Behnke, u miunduay ciniza.
